caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, suspenders, glasses, and a large, grey, spikey wig. He wears black headphones and sits before a black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks. On-screen logos appear on the left and right sides of the frame, featuring the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and smiling, shifting his head slightly and changing his facial expression as he talks. His arms remain crossed in front of him. The setting and equipment remain static, while the man's movements and expressions evolve as he engages in the conversation.
